name: Orak Limousine Svc Inc
recent_news: No public news, press, M&A, or media footprint found as of 2026-06. Not listed in NJ School Bus Contractors Association directory results returned by search.
fit_notes: Micro-operator (2 employees, ~$151K revenue) at residential/small-commercial Clifton address. Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in; at best an owner-operator livery that may run a few SPED routes under sub-contract. Not a priority target.

name: A Fantasy Limousine
recent_news: No web footprint found for the Fresno CA entity as of 2026-06. A similarly-named 'A Fantasy Limousine Service Inc' exists in Cantonment, FL (USDOT 1507867, 1 power unit, 4 drivers, MCS-150 last filed 2006) but is a different company at a different address/phone.
fit_notes: Fresno residential-address micro-operator (2 employees, ~$150K revenue). No discoverable school district contracts or SPED operations. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate; CA is also outside Summit's current core footprint.
